utility.name: Hackerbot2
utility.author: Mission Deny the Mission
utility.description: AI-Powered Cybersecurity Training Framework. An advanced chatbot with LLM integration (Ollama, OpenAI, VLLM, SGLang) that attacks and challenges users for educational purposes. Connects to an IRC server (localhost by default), supports RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) for knowledge enhancement, and provides AI-powered conversations for cybersecurity training. Enhanced version of the original Hackerbot with modern AI capabilities.
